arts.sum: Former Inter midfielder Wesley Sneijder previewed the upcoming SuperCoppa Italiana semi-final between his former side and Atalanta in an interview with Gazzetta dello Sport. The post Sneijder: ‘Inter are Super, Trust in Calhanoglu’ appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Atalanta CEO Percassi: ‘Transfer market? We have a complete squad”
arts.sum: Luca Percassi, CEO of Atalanta, shared his thoughts on the upcoming Supercoppa Italiana and the club's transfer market strategy from the team's training camp in Saudi Arabia. Speaking to the official Serie A channels, Percassi provided insights into the team's current state and future plans. The post Atalanta CEO Percassi: ‘Transfer market? We have a complete squad” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: SuperCoppa Italiana | Inter Milan v Atalanta: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Inter Milan prepare for their Supercoppa Italiana semi-final against Atalanta, manager Simone Inzaghi faces some defensive challenges. Key defenders Benjamin Pavard and Francesco Acerbi have not travelled with the squad to Riyadh, remaining in Milan due to injuries. However, there's positive news as Matteo Darmian has recovered from a knee issue and is available for selection. The post SuperCoppa Italiana | Inter Milan v Atalanta: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.
